title: Unbounded memory growth in _tx_start_times dict
description:
## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/metrics.py:127

## Description
The _tx_start_times dictionary stores the start time of every transmission and is never pruned. Unlike _delivered which serves as a deduplication set, this dict stores actual timing data needed for latency computation. The reset() method exists but is only called between simulation runs, not during a run.

## Failure Scenario
A long-running simulation with continuous transmissions (e.g., 24-hour stress test with 1000 nodes transmitting every second) accumulates 86.4 million entries in _tx_start_times. Each entry is (str key ~36 bytes + int value 28 bytes), consuming multiple GB of memory and eventually causing OOM.

## Category
safety
